description_long: This is a rectangular carton beverage container with a beige and blue color scheme, featuring the brand 'Madeta Jihočeské' prominently on the front. The packaging is decorated with illustrations of a rural building and green fields, giving it a natural, countryside feel. The front panel displays the product name 'MLÉKO POLOTUČNÉ čerstvé' in bold letters, with additional information and a green label at the bottom. The top of the carton is fitted with a white plastic screw cap, positioned off-center on the slanted top face. The sides of the carton include more branding, product details, and a barcode, while the back panel continues the rural illustration motif. The overall appearance is clean, with matte-finished printed graphics and a sturdy, slightly glossy surface typical of beverage cartons.
description: A beige and blue rectangular beverage carton with rural illustrations, a white screw cap, and prominent 'Madeta Jihočeské' branding. The packaging features detailed printed graphics and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main brand label, product name, and rural illustration with a green information panel at the bottom.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the brand name, a block of text, and the white screw cap angled to the left.
description_view_2: Back view with additional branding, a green tab at the top, and a continuation of the rural illustration.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the brand name, a percentage label, and the white screw cap angled to the right.
